title: Logs, Events, Metrics, Inspect, Debugging, and Incident Evidence · Layer and Runtime Forensics
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective layered Docker incident evidence packet; isolate the first causal fault in logs, events, metrics, inspect, debugging, and incident evidence and preserve a regression check before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in layered Docker incident evidence packet and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, an…
objectives: Design stdout and stderr logging plus driver, delivery, rotation, retention, metadata, backpressure, and secret-redaction policy.
Correlate time-bounded events with inspect state, exit cause, OOM, restart count, health output, mounts, networks, and effective configuration.
Interpret CPU, memory, network, block I/O, PIDs, cgroups, writable-layer size, image store, volume, and host pressure evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Docker Logs Drivers Rotation
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug container exits only after revision 6; an operator restarts it and edits files with exec before collecting state. Reconstruct the first causal layer from inspect, events, logs, stats, and release identity. Competency probe: Design stdout and stderr logging plus driver, delivery, rotation, retention, metadata, backpressure, and secret-redaction policy.

Inspect the Docker Logs Drivers Rotation trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Docker Layered Incident Method
steps.instruction:
Append the Docker evidence item headed "  # Evidence: docker-layered-incident-method-co3jh". Tailor its incident-evidence.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic review command, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run Docker commands later in an authorized disposable transfer environment.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Docker Layered Incident Method.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Docker Layered Incident Method into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Docker Layered Incident Method, keep Docker Layered Incident Method connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: docker-layered-incident-method-co3jh
  - competency: docker-layered-incident-method
    artifact: incident-evidence.yaml
    decision: layered incident method
    scenario-variant: 2
    environment: ephemeral development host with constrained disk and memory
    fault-injection: cancel during export after one platform finishes
    retained-proof: timestamped lifecycle transition and bounded cleanup result
    case-key: co3jh
    change: |
      baseline: ps-inspect-events-logs-stats
      correlation: release-digest-and-container-id
      mutation-policy: reproduce-before-exec
      diagnostic-image: separately-reviewed
      conclusion: first-causal-layer
    verify: docker inspect failed-api --format json && docker logs --timestamps failed-api
    failure: Reject interactive mutation as diagnosis, unbounded log collection, high-cardinality labels, or a restart presented as root-cause evidence.
    repair: Preserve state and timestamps, compare desired with observed configuration, isolate one layer, reproduce cleanly, and retain the causal regression.
